name: Casino Pawn
description_short: Privately owned pawn shop in Centennial, CO offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and item sales with no credit check required.
description_long:
Casino Pawn is a privately owned pawn shop located in Centennial, Colorado, with over 50 years of combined industry experience among its staff. The shop operates as a full-service pawnbroker accepting a wide range of collateral including precious metals, jewelry, watches, electronics, antiques, and firearms. They position themselves as a fast-cash alternative for consumers who need immediate liquidity without credit checks or traditional lending requirements.

The company offers three primary services: pawn loans (collateral-based renewable loans with monthly service charges), direct purchase of items for cash, and a no-interest lay-a-way program for customers interested in merchandise currently in stock. Their loan structure is transparent, with monthly service charges ranging from 10-20% depending on loan amount and item category. Notably, they advertise renewable loans with no time limit as long as monthly service charges are paid, and a 10-day grace period after the 30-day payment deadline before items enter default status.

Casino Pawn distinguishes itself through competitive positioning on pricing ("top price paid"), overhead cost advantage due to smaller operation size, and flexibility on loan terms via phone contact. They emphasize customer service as their priority and offer secured, confidential storage of pledged items. The shop also handles FFL transfers and maintains an eBay store for additional sales channels.

As a pawn shop, Casino Pawn serves consumers in immediate financial need but operates in a high-cost lending category. Monthly interest rates of 10-20% translate to 120-240% annualized rates, which are legal under Colorado pawn shop regulations but substantially exceed rates available through credit unions, personal loans, or payday alternatives. The business model requires customers to part with personal property, carries default risk through item forfeiture, and involves a 30-day police clearance hold on purchased items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No credit check required—loans available regardless of credit history
Renewable loans with no time limit as long as monthly service charge is paid
10-day grace period after 30-day payment deadline before item forfeiture
Transparent fee structure with published rates (10-20% monthly service charge)
Flexible terms—customers can call to arrange extensions or discuss payment options
Insured and confidential storage of pledged items during loan period
Same-day cash available upon loan approval or item sale
FFL transfer service available for firearms transactions
cons: High effective interest rates (10-20% monthly = 120-240% annualized) despite being legal under state law
Risk of losing personal property permanently if monthly service charges are not paid
30-day police hold on purchased items before resale, reducing liquidity advantage
Limited to single physical location in Centennial with restricted hours (closed Sundays)
Loan amounts above $10,000 require special phone approval, creating friction for larger transactions
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing immediate emergency cash
People with valuable items (gold, jewelry, electronics) who prefer to borrow rather than sell
Individuals seeking short-term collateral loans with flexible renewal terms
Sellers of precious metals and jewelry wanting competitive cash offers without consignment delays
diagnosis: Casino Pawn is best for consumers in immediate financial crisis who have valuable personal property but lack access to traditional credit. The critical caveat is that monthly interest rates of 10-20% (120-240% annualized) make this an expensive last-resort borrowing option compared to credit unions, personal loans, or emergency assistance programs—customers should exhaust lower-cost alternatives before pawning items.
services: Monthly service charge payments (10-20% depending on loan amount/category)
No-interest lay-a-way program (10% down, flexible payment terms)
Secured and insured storage of pledged items
Jewelry and watch appraisal and pawn
Firearms pawn and sale with FFL transfer
Grace period extensions on loan payments (10 days after 30-day deadline)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 12201 E Arapahoe Rd Unit A3, Englewood, CO 80112
